channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Merrin says Kaptur is 'out of touch' after 43 years in office
item.description: GOP candidate Derek Merrin stated Saturday he has momentum in the Ohio 9th District race against longtime Democratic Rep. Marcy Kaptur.

item.title: US Army meets 2026 recruiting goals four months early, Hegseth announces
item.description: The U.S. Army reached its 2026 recruiting targets four months early, marking a second consecutive record year, Pete Hegseth said at West Point.

item.title: Fabela says UAE showed 'tenacity' under fire
item.description: VEON Founder Augie Fabela told Newsmax that the UAE showed resilience during the opening weeks of Iran's missile and drone attacks.

item.title: Trump rates new Iran peace offer a solid 'maybe'; diplomat praises talks progress
